summary: Cut repository release 0.177.135 from the exact-main ADR 0294 replay source commit fa5e9ead212cf7f16535e3787ee38f7693b6f78d on top of origin/main commit b7dde631d290474de3200886846217e688e0c16e, re-converged the governed One-API lane across docker-runtime-lv3, postgres-lv3, proxmox-host, coolify-lv3, and nginx-lv3, and re-verified the Open WebUI, ServerClaw, and platform-context consumer paths end to end. The canonical replay keeps One-API as the private unified OpenAI-compatible proxy in front of Ollama, moves the governed Open WebUI and ServerClaw runtimes onto repo-managed One-API provider contracts, documents the transient docker-runtime disk-pressure recovery that the synchronized ServerClaw replay surfaced, and advances the tracked platform baseline to 0.130.85.

verification.observed: The managed release-status snapshot completed successfully on the exact-main integration branch, reported repository version 0.177.134 and platform version 0.130.85 with 0 blocking workstreams in progress, and the matching dry-run resolved the next protected release as 0.177.135 with exactly one unreleased changelog note for ADR 0294.

The managed release write completed successfully and prepared release 0.177.135 with 1 changelog note, updating VERSION, changelog.md, RELEASE.md, docs/release-notes/0.177.135.md, docs/release-notes/README.md, versions/stack.yaml, workstreams.yaml, README.md generated sections, build/platform-manifest.json, and the refreshed generated diagram state.

verification.check: Final release-state repository automation and validation
verification.observed: The release-state tree passed ./scripts/validate_repo.sh all after the final platform-version and workstream-surface alignment, then passed scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate, scripts/canonical_truth.py --check, git diff --check, and make pre-push-gate after the last generated platform-manifest refresh cleared the schema-validation drift.

verification.check: Exact-main targeted pytest and repository validation
verification.observed: The synchronized exact-main tree passed the targeted ADR 0294 pytest bundle with 174 passed in 14.59s, and ./scripts/validate_repo.sh all passed after the final grist_runtime idempotency ledger update and the Docker runtime assertion hardening landed.

verification.check: Exact-main One-API converge and bootstrap verification
verification.observed: make converge-one-api env=production completed successfully with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 ok=223 changed=4 failed=0, localhost ok=3 changed=0 failed=0, postgres-lv3 ok=73 changed=5 failed=0, and proxmox-host ok=41 changed=4 failed=0. The controller-side bootstrap verification reported verification_passed=true, exposed the governed chat and embedding aliases, returned chat probe excerpt READY, and kept both downstream provider env files present.

verification.check: Exact-main Open WebUI and ServerClaw consumer verification
verification.observed: make converge-open-webui env=production completed successfully with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 ok=151 changed=2 failed=0 and proxmox-host ok=41 changed=4 failed=0, including the admin sign-in verification path. The first make converge-serverclaw env=production replay failed because docker-runtime-lv3 exhausted free space during apt-get update; after the documented docker image prune -af plus docker builder prune -af recovery and a clean apt-get update, the second replay passed with coolify-lv3 ok=87 changed=4 failed=0, docker-runtime-lv3 ok=89 changed=0 failed=0, nginx-lv3 ok=45 changed=4 failed=0, and proxmox-host ok=360 changed=0 failed=0. Post-replay probes returned HTTP 200 for the Open WebUI controller path and HTTP/2 200 with the expected hardening headers for https://chat.example.com, while the rendered runtime env files showed OPENAI_API_BASE_URL pointing at One-API and ENABLE_OLLAMA_API=False for both governed consumers.

verification.check: Exact-main platform-context and ServerClaw memory verification
verification.observed: make converge-rag-context env=production completed successfully with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 ok=182 changed=21 failed=0 and proxmox-host ok=41 changed=4 failed=0. The replay verified cited platform-context query results and the ServerClaw memory smoke round-tripped through both semantic and keyword recall.

notes: ADR 0294 is now recorded as implemented in repository version 0.177.135 and first verified live in platform version 0.130.85.

The canonical exact-main replay remained rooted in origin/main commit b7dde631d290474de3200886846217e688e0c16e, and this receipt points at the committed replay source fa5e9ead212cf7f16535e3787ee38f7693b6f78d before the final merge-to-main commit is created.

Raw provider-env captures were intentionally not retained in the committed evidence set because they contained active consumer tokens; the bootstrap report and downstream runtime env verification files are the canonical non-secret proofs for the generated One-API provider contracts.

The first synchronized ServerClaw replay surfaced docker-runtime-lv3 disk pressure during apt metadata refresh. The documented cache cleanup and successful rerun are intentionally preserved here as the truthful latest-main operational recovery trail.

The first release-state pre-push gate after the protected release write caught stale generated platform-manifest output. Regenerating build/platform-manifest.json and rerunning the gate produced the final all-green release-state validation bundle recorded here.
